'''zadhawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olallaberry|olallaberry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olallaberry|olallaberry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadhawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædhæwæth|zædhæwæth]] || [[word:zædhæwæj|zædhæwæj]] || [[word:zædhæwæsh|zædhæwæsh]] || [[word:zædhæwæ|zædhæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadhadhawath|zadhadhawath]] || [[word:zadhadhawaj|zadhadhawaj]] || [[word:zadhadhawash|zadhadhawash]] || [[word:zadhadhawa|zadhadhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadhawath|zadhawath]] || [[word:zadhawaj|zadhawaj]] || [[word:zadhawash|zadhawash]] || [[word:zadhawa|zadhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadhafwath|zadhafwath]] || [[word:zadhafwaj|zadhafwaj]] || [[word:zadhafwash|zadhafwash]] || [[word:zadhafwaf|zadhafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadhawatha|zadhawatha]] || [[word:zadhawaja|zadhawaja]] || [[word:zadhawasha|zadhawasha]] || [[word:zadhawaka|zadhawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadhawath|zadhawath]] || [[word:zadhawaj|zadhawaj]] || [[word:zadhawash|zadhawash]] || [[word:zadhawa|zadhawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadhawathal|zadhawathal]] || [[word:zadhawajal|zadhawajal]] || [[word:zadhawashal|zadhawashal]] || [[word:zadhawakal|zadhawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadhawathatha|zadhawathatha]] || [[word:zadhawajaja|zadhawajaja]] || [[word:zadhawashasha|zadhawashasha]] || [[word:zadhawaka|zadhawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadhawathan|zadhawathan]] || [[word:zadhawajan|zadhawajan]] || [[word:zadhawashan|zadhawashan]] || [[word:zadhawakan|zadhawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadhawathaoro|zadhawathaoro]] || [[word:zadhawajaoro|zadhawajaoro]] || [[word:zadhawashaoro|zadhawashaoro]] || [[word:zadhawakaoro|zadhawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
